sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_test (id INT, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO time_test (id, event_time) VALUES (1, time '10:15:30');
UPDATE time_test SET event_time = time '12:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM time_test WHERE event_time > time '09:00:00';
DELETE FROM time_test WHERE event_time = time '12:00:00';
